display.purpose: Page titles and hero headings; Spectral serif, clamp topping at 5rem.

title.purpose: Sub-headings, card / aside titles, table headers, summary — the serif on interface objects.

body.purpose: The reading column: Atkinson ~18px / 1.75, capped at ~70ch.

label.purpose: Sidebar section labels and chrome; uppercase, tracked, xs.

code.purpose: Inline and block code; JetBrains Mono.

shadows.name: card-hover-sm
shadows.purpose: Soft lift under a card on hover only; never at rest (Flat-At-Rest Rule).

shadows.name: button-hover-md
shadows.purpose: Lift under the primary button on hover.

shadows.name: header-shadow-light
shadows.purpose: Sticky-header lift on the white surface.

shadows.name: header-shadow-dark
shadows.value: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.94 0.012 85) 13%, transparent), 0 11px 26px -11px color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.94 0.012 85) 17%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Header lift on near-black, built from light (lit lip + upward bloom) since dark can't take a cast shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: The single theme easing curve for every transition and entrance.

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Hero copy + actions entrance; gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.

motion.name: dialog-in
motion.purpose: Search dialog rise + scale-settle on open.

motion.name: reduced-motion-reset
motion.purpose: Universal instant-on fallback under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce (the one sanctioned !important).

breakpoints.name: wide
breakpoints.purpose: Hero goes two-column; FeatureGrid layouts engage; below this everything is a single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description:
The full honey-amber as a fill with an ink label — the brand
      at full strength.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 80); color: oklch(0.22 0.015 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.78 0.14 80); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px -8px rgba(20,16,8,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.12 68); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Transparent with a muted border that warms to the accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.52 0.12 68); border: 1px solid oklch(0.62 0.008 80); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(0.52 0.12 68); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.12 68); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Minimal Button
components.description: No box — accent text with a thin underline that solidifies on hover, so it reads as a link.
components.css: .ds-btn-minimal { color: oklch(0.52 0.12 68); font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 0.2em; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklab, currentColor 45%, transparent); transition: text-decoration-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-minimal:hover { text-decoration-color: currentColor; }

components.name: Card
components.description: A hairline-defined card on the page surface that lifts and warms its border on hover; serif title.
components.html:
Legible by design

Body text is set in Atkinson Hyperlegible Next, engineered to keep letterforms distinct at every size.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.8 0.005 80); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.52 0.12 68) 60%, oklch(0.8 0.005 80)); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px -10px rgba(20,16,8,0.30); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-family: Spectral, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.012em; color: oklch(0.22 0.015 80); } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.33 0.012 80); }

components.name: Aside (Note)
components.description: Full softened hairline + tinted fill + icon — never a side stripe. Note variant in petrol-teal.
components.html:
Note

A note shares the calm petrol-teal of inline code — it is information, set apart.
components.css: .ds-aside-note { background: oklch(0.95 0.03 205); border: 1px solid oklch(0.62 0.10 205 / 0.45); border-radius: 0.625rem; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; } .ds-aside-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; font-family: Spectral, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: oklch(0.40 0.08 205); } .ds-aside-body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.33 0.012 80); }

components.name: Inline Code
components.description: Petrol-teal text on a neutral chip with a hairline border — the information register.
components.html: Install with pnpm add starlight-theme-exquisitus and go.
components.css: .ds-code-context { font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.33 0.012 80); } .ds-code-inline { background: oklch(0.93 0.004 80); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.62 0.008 80) 22%, transparent); color: oklch(0.44 0.09 205); border-radius: 0.3125rem; padding: 0.1em 0.35em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9em; }

components.name: FeatureGrid (lead)
components.description: Signature splash layout: a full-width thesis card over auto-fit supporting peers. The deliberate alternative to the identical card grid.
components.html:
A theme built around the sentence

The lead card carries the one idea everything else supports.

Editorial structure

Headings shift to Spectral.

Color with intent

Each hue does one job.
components.css: .ds-feature-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(15rem, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; } .ds-feature-grid .ds-fg-lead { grid-column: 1 / -1; } .ds-fg-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.8 0.005 80); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-fg-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-family: Spectral, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.012em; color: oklch(0.22 0.015 80); } .ds-fg-body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible Next Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.33 0.012 80); }

narrative.overview: Exquisitus treats a documentation page the way a great publication treats a feature: the reading column is the protagonist, and everything else — navigation, chrome, color — exists to usher the reader into the text and then disappear. Surfaces are flat and hairline-separated, never filled panels; color is spent deliberately — honey-amber for emphasis, petrol-teal for information — and warmth lives in the ink and the accent, never in a tinted background. It rejects both the hacker/terminal aesthetic and the generic SaaS-docs default. The voice is a senior colleague who explains something well: measured and self-assured, restraining itself with intent and acknowledging the reader without performing for them.
keyCharacteristics: Content is sovereign — the reading column is the design; the rest is service.
Generous, accessible type by conviction: ~18px body, 1.75 line-height, a ~70ch measure.
A full palette held in tight discipline: honey-amber for emphasis, petrol-teal for information.
Flat, hairline-separated surfaces; depth from tonal layering, not shadow.
Accessible by conviction — WCAG 2.2 AA floor, light and dark both, every motion gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Sovereign Column Rule
rules.body: Color never enters the body reading column except as a link or an inline <mark>. Prose is ink on surface — full stop.

rules.name: The Two-Job Rule
rules.body: Honey-amber is warmth and emphasis; petrol-teal is information and code. Neither crosses into the other's job.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: Light surface is pure white, dark is near-black. Warmth is carried by ink, amber, and type — never by tinting the paper.

rules.name: The Deepened-Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent text is bronze in light mode and brightened honey in dark mode; raw honey only ever appears as a fill with an ink label.

rules.name: The Splash Tint Exception
rules.body: FeatureGrid icon chips on a splash page may each carry a soft low-chroma tint from the semantic ramp — a small rare splash that never loosens the Two-Job Rule elsewhere.

rules.name: The Generous Body Rule
rules.body: Body type is set larger and looser than convention (~18px / 1.75). When in doubt, bigger.

rules.name: The 65-75ch Rule
rules.body: The reading measure is capped at ~70 characters regardless of viewport. A wide screen gets wider margins, never a wider line.

rules.name: The Serif-Marks-Structure Rule
rules.body: Spectral marks every structural or editorial element; the sans never carries a heading, the serif never carries running body.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a tonal step before a shadow. Surfaces are distinguished by lightness, not by floating.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: No element carries a shadow at rest. A shadow is a reply to hover, focus, or scroll — never decoration.

rules.name: The No-Blur Rule
rules.body: Sticky surfaces are opaque. No backdrop-filter glass on the header, TOC, or dialogs.

dos: Do keep the body reading column ink-on-surface, capped at ~70ch (42rem), set generously larger than the docs default (~18px / 1.75).
Do let the honey-amber accent appear rarely and meaningfully — links, active state, selection, focus. Its rarity is the point.
Do keep accent text bronze in light mode and brightened honey in dark mode; only ever show the full honey as a fill with an ink label.
Do give petrol-teal its one job — information and code — and keep it there.
Do separate surfaces with a single hairline and tonal steps; reach for a shadow only as a response to hover, focus, or scroll.
Do treat light and dark as equally first-class, both hitting WCAG 2.2 AA.
Do author all theme CSS in the exquisitus cascade layer and honor prefers-reduced-motion on every transition.
donts: Don't ship the hacker / terminal aesthetic — no monospace-everything, no green-on-black, no cyberpunk costume.
Don't ship generic SaaS docs — the Mintlify / Docusaurus default of clean-white-plus-blue-primary with a forgettable sidebar.
Don't carry warmth in the body background — no cream / sand / parchment surface.
Don't use side-stripe accent borders (border-left / border-right > 1px) on asides, callouts, blockquotes, details, or cards.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or backdrop-blur on sticky chrome.
Don't use elegant-but-illegible light-grey body copy; muted text still clears 4.5:1.
Don't let color enter the prose reading column beyond links and inline <mark>.
Don't ship the identical card grid; use FeatureGrid's editorial layouts instead.
Don't shrink the body type to fit more on screen. The Generous Body Rule wins.
Don't reach for !important; the cascade layer order makes it unnecessary.
